recommendations.title: Viking Wolf
recommendations.overview: After witnessing a grotesque murder at a party in her new town, a teenager starts having strange visions and bizarre desires.

recommendations.title: The X Files: I Want to Believe
recommendations.overview: Mulder and Scully are called back to duty by the FBI when a former priest claims to be receiving psychic visions pertaining to a kidnapped agent.

recommendations.title: The Canal
recommendations.overview: A man who suspects his wife is cheating on him begins having nightmarish visions of an evil presence that he believes inhabits his house.

recommendations.title: Recalled
recommendations.overview: Soo-jin, who lost her memories due to a horrible incident, starts suspecting her husband. She is confused between reality and illusion, truth and lies.

recommendations.title: Images
recommendations.overview: While holidaying in Ireland, a pregnant children's author finds her mental state becoming increasingly unstable, resulting in paranoia, hallucinations, and visions of a doppelgänger.

recommendations.title: Stir of Echoes
recommendations.overview: After being hypnotized by his sister-in-law, Tom Witzky begins seeing haunting visions of a girl's ghost and a mystery begins to unfold around her.

recommendations.title: The Return
recommendations.overview: Joanna Mills has a successful career but feels her personal life is spinning out of control. She has few friends, an estranged father, and a crazy ex-boyfriend who is stalking her. Joanna begins having terrifying visions of a woman's murder, and it s

recommendations.title: Reeker
recommendations.overview: Strangers trapped at an eerie travel oasis in the desert must unravel the mystery behind their visions of dying people while they are preyed upon by a decaying creature.

recommendations.title: Donnie Darko
recommendations.overview: After narrowly escaping a bizarre accident, a troubled teenager is plagued by visions of a large bunny rabbit that manipulates him to commit a series of crimes.

recommendations.title: Next Door
recommendations.overview: After Ingrid leaves John, he allows himself to be pulled into a mystical and scary world where it is impossible to separate truth from lies.
